name: fastify-production
description: This skill should be used when deploying Fastify to production, configuring Fastify security headers, setting up reverse proxy with Fastify, implementing graceful shutdown, configuring @fastify/helmet, @fastify/cors, @fastify/rate-limit, trustProxy settings, Kubernetes Fastify deployment, Fastify performance tuning, request timeouts, handler timeouts, return503OnClosing, prototype poisoning protection, production Fastify checklist, or hardening Fastify server.
